channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Gary Woodland receives PGA Tour Courage Award as he returns from brain surgery
item.description: PALM BEACH GARDENS, Fla. (AP) — Former U.S. Open champion Gary Woodland was honored Wednesday with the PGA Tour Courage Award as he comes back from brain surgery to remove a lesion that was causing him to have unfounded thoughts that he was dying. Woodland, who won the U.S.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Dolphins and Vikings finish 1-2 in NFLPA report cards for the second straight year
item.description: INDIANAPOLIS (AP) — The Miami Dolphins are the top-ranked team, followed by the Minnesota Vikings, for the second consecutive season in the NFL Players Association report card.
item.dc:creator: ROB MAADDI, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: New Orleans Privateers players' suspensions related to possible NCAA violations, AP source says
item.description: NEW ORLEANS (AP) — Four New Orleans players who've been suspended since late January are under investigation for possible NCAA violations related to sports gambling, a person familiar with the situation said.
item.dc:creator: BRETT MARTEL, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Defensive end Abdul Carter says he's the best player in NFL 2025 draft class
item.description: INDIANAPOLIS (AP) — Former Penn State star Abdul Carter made one thing clear Wednesday: He should be the No. 1 overall pick in this year's NFL draft.
item.dc:creator: MICHAEL MAROT, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Lando Norris is fastest and Lewis Hamilton 13th as a power cut disrupts F1 testing
item.description: SAKHIR, Bahrain (AP) — Lando Norris was fastest and seven-time champion Lewis Hamilton 13th as Formula 1 teams had to deal with a power outage that disrupted preseason testing Wednesday.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: MLS fines Lionel Messi over post-match incident with NYCFC coach
item.description: Major League Soccer fined Inter Miami star Lionel Messi an undisclosed amount on Tuesday for grabbing the back of the neck of an NYCFC assistant coach.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Bengals plan to make All-Pro receiver Ja'Marr Chase the NFL's highest-paid non-quarterback
item.description: INDIANAPOLIS (AP) — The Cincinnati Bengals plan to make All-Pro wide receiver Ja’Marr Chase the highest-paid non-quarterback in the NFL. “He is going to end up being the No. 1 paid non-quarterback in the league,” director of player personnel Duke Tobin said Tuesday at the NFL scouting combine.
item.dc:creator: ROB MAADDI, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Hayton records first Utah hat trick in 5-3 loss to Kings
item.description: LOS ANGELES (ABC4 Sports) - Despite Barrett Hayton recording the first hat trick in Utah Hockey Club history, Drew Doughty had a goal and two assists in the Los Angeles Kings’ 5-3 win at Crypto.com Arena on Saturday. “I thought we kind of left it all out there, played with good pace,” Hayton said.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Singer of Canadian anthem at 4 Nations Face-Off changes lyric to protest Trump's 51st state remarks
item.description: The anthem singer who performed the Canadian anthem prior to the 4 Nations Face-Off championship game Thursday night changed a lyric in “O Canada” as a response to U.S. President Donald Trump's repeated remarks about making the country the 51st state.
item.dc:creator: STEPHEN WHYNO and KEN POWTAK, Associated Press, NewsNation
